---
title: "Teaching"
---

# Intro to R - Universität Potsdam
Short R intro course. For the homework, remember to "download linked file"" in order to download the R notebook. 

- [Lecture 1](IntroStats1.html) and [Homework 1](Homework1.Rmd)
- [Lecture 2](IntroStats2.html) and [Homework 2](Homework2.Rmd)
